title: Verify structured INSIGHTS invocation
preconditions: Every Public INSIGHTS Operation is registered and callable through the shared Tally executor.
steps: Invoke each operation with valid input, malformed JSON, unknown fields, missing authority, incompatible versions, expected business failures, interrupted result delivery, and canary payloads.
expected: Every invocation returns exactly one documented envelope and exit category; validation and compatibility happen before processing; stdout, stderr, diagnostics, and retry behavior satisfy FR-INSIGHTS-STRUCTURED-INVOCATION.
